title: AI Developed Trading Engine - Feedback Request
author: Desperate_Advance_73
selftext:
Hello all. I have made my first attempt at building a trading engine with no previous computer developer or python experience. I have a day job in commercial real estate but still trade options actively during the week and that can overlap with my daytime job where I can't be focused on derivatives trading strategies. 

  
In recent months, I have been downloading options prices, open interest, gamma exposures, and other data from excel and manually uploading to AI systems to query my strategies. I realized that there must be a better way where I can automate the pricing data into an AI chat and then query it actively. The underlying API integration and python coding are not something I was aware of. 

I wanted to show what I have done in my V1 engine, which I am currently rebuilding based on my lessons learned.  I do know there are tools with dashboards and engines that can be run like this. I think the uniqueness is that this is highly customized to a trading strategy(s). I can now go to a LLM, create a trading strategy in words, take it to an AI coding agent, code my strategy into a python engine, and run it through my highly customizable dashboard).

  
Appreciate any advice and feedback.

  
\--
